description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Windows build that triggers on push events. The workflow should have two jobs: build on a Windows 2022 environment and notify on an Ubuntu 20.04 environment if the build job fails. The build job checks out the repository, sets up a build environment, installs dependencies including Boost, configures and builds the project with CMake, and archives the build artifacts. The notify job sends a Discord notification with details of the failed build.
